recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: In a small town on Christmas Eve, a snowstorm brings together a group of young people. They soon find their friendships and love lives colliding, and come Christmas morning, nothing will be the same.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Return to Christmas Creek
recommendations.overview: As Christmas approaches, Amelia Hughes, a career-focused Chicago app developer lacking in holiday spirit, returns to her small hometown of Christmas Creek to rediscover the meaning of Christmas. There, she reunites with her childhood best friend Mike

recommendations.title: A Loud House Christmas
recommendations.overview: Lincoln Loud gears up for the ultimate Christmas, until he finds out that most of his sisters have plans to be elsewhere for the big day. Determined to remind his family that they all need to be together, Lincoln and his best friend Clyde McBride emb

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: The Bishop's Wife
recommendations.overview: An Episcopal Bishop, Henry Brougham, has been working for months on the plans for an elaborate new cathedral which he hopes will be paid for primarily by a wealthy, stubborn widow. He is losing sight of his family and of why he became a churchman in

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: Bread, Love and Dreams
recommendations.overview: When a veteran marshal is sent to a small town, he quickly falls for two women: a midwife and an earthy young woman nicknamed "Frisky".

recommendations.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: When Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and refuses to celebrate Christmas, the Smurfs of Christmas Past, Present and Future teach him to appreciate Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.
